headline: SWK Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Here today, in addition to myself, is Don Allan, President and CEO; and Chris Nelson, COO, EVP and President, Tools & Outdoor; and Pat Hallinan, EVP and CFO.  A replay of this morning's webcast will also be available beginning at 11 a.m. today.

headline: SWK Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Christopher Nelson: Thank you, Michael, and good morning, everyone.  Stanley Black & Decker has made tremendous progress towards the objectives we established at the outset of our strategic transformation.

headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Stanley Black & Decker, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: Baird  analyst Timothy Wojs   maintains Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $85 to $82.
